issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: VC Boom
products.tagline: Score your deck, meet investors who fit, and raise more
products.summaryZh: 评估你的项目组合，对接合适的投资人，筹集更多资金。
products.descriptionZh: VC Boom 可在90秒内评估你的融资演示文稿，指出最需改进之处，并从超过47,000名投资者中匹配合适人选（每位附上一行匹配理由），随后生成个性化冷启动邮件，你可直接从自己的邮箱发送。针对每位投资者做好准备，再预约通话。使用VC Boom的创始人已成功融资9500万美元。该工具由一位拥有8年风投经验、曾筹集数亿美元并投资47家初创公司的投资人打造。免费使用，无需订阅。
products.description: VC Boom scores your pitch deck in under 90 seconds and tells you the single fastest fix, matches you with the right investors from 47,000+ (each with a one-line reason they fit), then drafts personalized cold emails you send from your own inbox. Prep for each investor, then book the calls. Founders using VC Boom have already raised $95M. Built by an 8-year VC who raised hundreds of millions and deployed across 47 startups. Free to start, no subscription.

products.name: ZeroGPU
products.tagline: The compute efficient layer for AI inference
products.summaryZh: 面向AI推理的高效计算层
products.descriptionZh: 全球算力建设速度已无法跟上AI需求增长。我们选择了一条不同的路径。ZeroGPU是基于混合边缘网络的AI基础设施，通过复用现有算力运行小型语言模型。并非所有任务都需要前沿模型。我们专为边缘场景优化的模型运行速度快10倍，成本降低50%，可将70%-80%的生产任务分流至具备前沿级精度的小型模型。
products.description: The world can't build compute fast enough to keep up with AI demand. So we took a different path. ZeroGPU is AI infrastructure powered by small language models running on a hybrid edge network reusing compute that already exists. Not every task needs a frontier model. Our purpose-built, edge-optimized models run 10x faster, 50% cheaper and offload 70–80% of production tasks to small models with frontier-level accuracy.

products.name: prostir zvuku
products.tagline: A spatial nature sound mixer for Mac
products.summaryZh: Mac版空间自然声音混音器
products.descriptionZh: 在你周围构建一个安静的空间，用于专注、休息和睡眠。在画布上混合雨声、火焰、海浪、风声、鸟鸣与溪流，将每种声音置于其所属之处，并在需要时随时回到同一空间。
products.description: Build a quiet room around you for focus, rest, and sleep. Mix rain, fire, ocean, wind, birds, and streams on a canvas, place each sound where it belongs, and return to the same space whenever you need it.

products.name: Krisp Voice Translation API
products.tagline: Real-time speech-to-speech translation API
products.summaryZh: 实时语音到语音翻译API
products.descriptionZh: 大多数语音翻译API在演示中表现完美。但真实用户一出现，背景噪音、口音和验证码就会导致翻译混乱。我们的技术基于百万次真实联络中心通话构建，在这些场景中准确性不容妥协。真实通话准确率达96%，零患者安全事故，支持61种以上语言任意互译。翻译API现已开放自助服务，注册开发者控制台即可获赠60分钟免费额度。
products.description: Most voice translation APIs work great in demos. Then real users show up with background noise, accents and verification code that gets garbled. We built our technology on a million live contact center calls where accuracy is non negotiable. 96% accuracy on real calls, zero patient safety incidents, 61+ languages with any to any pair. Translation API is now available self-serve with 60 mins free credit upon signup to dev dashboard.

products.name: agmsg
products.tagline: Stop copy-pasting between your AI coding agents
products.summaryZh: 停止在AI编程助手之间复制粘贴
products.descriptionZh: 别再当AI编程代理之间的复制粘贴中转站了。agmsg让Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI和Copilot CLI通过共享SQLite数据库直接互通——无需守护进程、无需网络、无需Python。只需bash加sqlite3，以Agent Skill形式安装。与内置子代理（单一厂商、临时性）或MCP（代理调用工具）不同，agmsg跨厂商且持久化。在同一个房间内运行多个代理——甚至多个Claude Code实例——协同工作。
products.description: Stop being the copy-paste relay between your AI coding agents. agmsg lets Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and Copilot CLI message each other directly through a shared SQLite database — no daemon, no network, no Python. Just bash + sqlite3, installed as an Agent Skill. Unlike built-in subagents (single-vendor, ephemeral) or MCP (an agent calling tools), agmsg is vendor-agnostic and persistent. Run several agents — even multiple Claude Code instances — in one room, working together.

products.name: Kimi Work
products.tagline: The AI desktop for knowledge work
products.summaryZh: AI桌面，专为知识工作打造
products.descriptionZh: Kimi Work 是一款面向知识工作的桌面代理工具。它可连接本地文件，通过 WebBridge 实现浏览器自动化，运行定时任务，协调代理集群，生成 PPT/Excel/Word/PDF 输出，并内置原生金融数据工具。
products.description: Kimi Work is a desktop agent for knowledge work. It connects to local files, uses WebBridge for browser automation, runs scheduled tasks, coordinates agent swarms, creates PPT/Excel/Word/PDF outputs, and includes native finance data tools.

products.name: Uiverse Design
products.tagline: De-slop your AI generated websites
products.summaryZh: 去除AI生成网站的粗糙感
products.descriptionZh: 一个应用是不是用“氛围编码”做出来的，一眼就能看出来。你的用户也一样。那种千篇一律的紫色渐变、胶囊按钮和徽章、满屏的 emoji，都在喊：“这是 AI 二十分钟搞出来的。”Uiverse Design 是一套以 AI 为先的设计系统库，可以直接嵌入任何项目。每个系统都定义了真实的字体、间距、色彩、图片和组件处理方式。所有系统都附带一份 DESIGN.md 说明文件，让你的 AI 代理清楚知道该怎么用。你只需坐享其成，看着你的应用焕然一新。
products.description: You can tell when an app was vibecoded. So can your users. That generic purple gradient, the pills and badges, emojis everywhere, it all screams: "an AI made this in 20 minutes." Uiverse Design is a library of AI-first design systems you can drop into any project. Each one defines real typography, spacing, color, images and component treatment. All of them ship with a DESIGN.md instructions file, so that your agent knows exactly how to use it. You just sit back, and watch your app transform.

products.name: BooBar
products.tagline: AI Dynamic Island for your Mac
products.summaryZh: AI Dynamic Island 现已登陆 Mac
products.descriptionZh: BooBar 是一款面向 Mac 的本地优先 AI 动态岛工具，将文件整理、下载进度、邮箱验证码、浏览器上下文、GitHub 面板以及 Codex/Claude 任务整合到一个简洁的菜单栏工作区中。
products.description: BooBar is a local-first AI Dynamic Island for Mac that brings file organization, download progress, email codes, browser context, GitHub panels, and Codex/Claude tasks into one calm menu bar workspace.

products.name: Fluido
products.tagline: Turn any Figma shape into liquid metal in one click
products.summaryZh: 一键将任意Figma形状转化为液态金属效果
products.descriptionZh: Fluido 是一款生成式设计工具，能将液态金属与铬合金的迷人美学直接带入你的 Figma 画布。即刻将矢量图形、文本或框架转化为有机流动的杰作。
products.description: Fluido is a generative design tool that brings the mesmerizing aesthetic of liquid metal and chrome directly into your Figma canvas. Transform vectors, text, or frames into organic, fluid masterpieces instantly.

products.name: hora Calendar
products.tagline: Google calendar built for the Mac
products.summaryZh: 专为Mac打造的Google日历
products.descriptionZh: hora Calendar 是一款适用于 Google Calendar 的原生 Mac 应用。可在菜单栏查看下一场会议，一键加入 Meet、Zoom 和 Teams，快速创建活动，安排专注时间，并直接与 Google 同步，无需通过 hora 服务器代理日历数据。
products.description: hora Calendar is a native Mac app for Google Calendar. See your next meeting in the menu bar, join Meet, Zoom, and Teams in one click, create events fast, schedule focus time, and sync directly with Google without proxying calendar data through hora servers.

products.name: TravelMind
products.tagline: AI-powered city discovery built on taste, not reviews
products.summaryZh: 基于AI的城市探索，由品味驱动，而非评论。
products.descriptionZh: 你抵达一座新城市。打开所有熟悉的App。两小时后仍在滑动屏幕，依然不确定，依然在猜测。TravelMind正是为这一刻而生。滑动浏览地点，告诉我们你的喜好——剩下的交给AI。它学习你的品味，在你意识到要找之前就找到合适的地方。你的品味。每一座城市。现已登陆iOS和Android。
products.description: You land in a new city. You open every app you know. Two hours later you're still scrolling, still unsure, still guessing. TravelMind was built for that moment. Swipe through places, tell us what you love — the AI does the rest. It learns your taste and finds the right spot before you even know to look. Your taste. Every city. Live now on iOS and Android.

products.name: Reve 2.0
products.tagline: Generate and edit 4K images through layout-based control
products.summaryZh: 通过基于布局的控制生成和编辑4K图像
products.descriptionZh: Reve 2.0 采用布局优先模型，将每张图像分割为可寻址区域，用于生成和编辑4K图像。适用于需要精确构图控制的设计师、营销人员及创意团队。
products.description: Reve 2.0 generates and edits 4K images using a layout-first model that segments each image into addressable regions. For designers, marketers, and creative teams who need precise compositional control.

products.name: Limelight
products.tagline: Make your screen recordings easy to follow
products.summaryZh: 让屏幕录制更清晰易懂
products.descriptionZh: Limelight 让你屏幕上的每一步操作都清晰可见。🔦 高亮光标、⌨️ 显示按键、✏️ 在屏幕上绘图——观众再也不会跟不上你的操作。兼容 Zoom、OBS、Keynote、Google Slides 等任意软件。原生应用，离线可用，无需账户。无需订阅——一次性付费 $9，提供 7 天免费试用。
products.description: Limelight makes everything you do on screen easy to follow. 🔦 Spotlight your cursor, ⌨️ show the keys you press, and ✏️ draw on screen — so your audience never loses track of what you're doing. Works with Zoom, OBS, Keynote, Google Slides, anything. Native, offline, no account. No subscription — $9 once, with a 7-day free trial.

products.name: Whistle
products.tagline: A fitness coach with personalized plans
products.summaryZh: 个性化计划健身教练
products.descriptionZh: 大多数健身应用只会给你一个通用计划，却称之为个性化。Whistle 真正了解你。它读取你的 Apple 健康数据，围绕你的体能水平、恢复状态和目标，构建真正的训练计划。详细的动作指导、智能的进度安排，全部在你的 iPhone 和 Apple Watch 上完成。无论你是刚开始锻炼，还是正朝着新的个人最佳成绩冲刺，你的 AI 教练都会判断你需要什么、何时需要。你的数据。你的计划。你的节奏。
products.description: Most workout apps give you a generic plan and call it personalized. Whistle actually knows you. It reads your Apple Health data and builds a real training plan around your fitness level, recovery, and goals. Detailed workouts, smart progression, all on your iPhone and Apple Watch. Whether you're just getting started or pushing toward a new personal best, your AI coach figures out what you need and when you need it. Your data. Your plan. Your pace.

products.name: agentcad
products.tagline: A CAD design tool for coding agents (free + open source)
products.summaryZh: 面向编码智能体的CAD设计工具（免费+开源）
products.descriptionZh: 让你的编程智能体具备设计真实、可制造零件的能力。向Claude Code或Codex提供提示、草图或图像，它会编写build123d或CadQuery脚本，然后运行agentcad自我检查——捕捉错误代码，确认几何体水密且尺寸正确，并从各个角度渲染，使智能体在你看到之前就修正错误。你将获得交互式查看器以及STEP/STL/GLB文件——可直接检查、编辑或打印。
products.description: Give your coding agent the ability to design real, manufacturable parts. Hand Claude Code or Codex a prompt, a sketch, or image. It writes build123d or CadQuery scripts, then runs agentcad to check its own work, catching broken code, confirming the geometry is watertight and dimensionally correct, and rendering it from every angle so your agent fixes its mistakes before you ever see them. You get back an interactive viewer plus STEP / STL / GLB files — ready to inspect, edit, or print.

products.name: Signal Recorder SR-7
products.tagline: On-device voice recorder that transcribes + exports Markdown
products.summaryZh: 设备端录音机，支持转录并导出Markdown格式
products.descriptionZh: 隐私优先的Mac和iPhone录音工具。转录与AI摘要通过Apple语音及基础模型在设备端运行——无需服务器、无需账户、数据绝不离开设备。每次录音导出为含YAML前置元数据的Markdown文件——文件归你所有，存于本地磁盘，可直接用于Obsidian或git。内置本地MCP服务器支持Claude Code等AI工具查询存档。以体验为先的设计，让你沉浸当下。7.99美元，一次购买——Mac和iPhone通用，无需订阅。
products.description: Privacy-first voice recorder for Mac and iPhone. Transcripts and AI summaries run on-device via Apple Speech and FoundationModels — no server, no account, nothing leaving your machine. Every recording exports as a Markdown file with YAML frontmatter — yours, on disk, ready for Obsidian or git. A built-in local MCP server lets Claude Code and other AI tools query the archive. Designed experience-first, to keep you in the moment. $7.99, buy once — Mac and iPhone, no subscription.

products.name: Solarch
products.tagline: Interactive diagrams with AI, and your code always in sync
products.summaryZh: AI 驱动的交互式图表，代码始终同步
products.descriptionZh: Solarch 是一个由严格规则引擎驱动的图表转代码平台。它能将可视化节点即时转换为确定性的样板代码，如 DTO 和服务。我们构建架构中重复的 80%，让你专注于核心逻辑的编码。
products.description: Solarch is a diagram-to-code platform powered by a strict rules engine. It instantly transforms visual nodes into deterministic boilerplate code like DTOs and Services. We build the repetitive 80% of the architecture so you can code the core logic.

products.name: AgentOS
products.tagline: Manage AI agents, tasks, workspaces from one control layer
products.summaryZh: 从一个控制层管理AI智能体、任务和工作空间
products.descriptionZh: 像运营公司一样运行AI智能体。AgentOS帮助你在基于OpenClaw构建的本地优先控制面板上，统一管理工作区、智能体、任务、作业、审批和运行时可见性。
products.description: Run AI agents like a company. AgentOS helps you coordinate workspaces, agents, tasks, jobs, approvals, and runtime visibility from one local-first control surface built on OpenClaw.

products.name: NudgeFile
products.tagline: Automatically organize, rename, and manage files with AI
products.summaryZh: 使用AI自动整理、重命名和管理文件
products.descriptionZh: NudgeFile 利用本地AI自动整理、重命名和管理文件。监控文件夹、自动化工作流程、检测重复文件，保持工作区整洁——全程数据保留在您的设备上。
products.description: NudgeFile automatically organizes, renames, and manages files using local AI. Monitor folders, automate workflows, detect duplicates, and keep your workspace clean—all while keeping your data on your device.

products.name: Mic Drop 3.0
products.tagline: Mute your mic in any app—with your AirPods
products.summaryZh: 在任何应用中静音麦克风——使用你的 AirPods
products.descriptionZh: 终极macOS静音管理器回归。通过全局快捷键、菜单栏图标或轻捏AirPods，即可在Zoom、Meet和Slack中即时切换麦克风。现在更快、更轻量，并全面支持AppleScript。
products.description: The ultimate macOS mute manager is back. Toggle your mic across Zoom, Meet, and Slack instantly using a global shortcut, menu bar icon, or a simple squeeze of your AirPods. Now faster, lighter, and packed with AppleScript support.
